apps.name: Goose
apps.subtitle: WHOOP biometric tracker
apps.localizedDescription: iOS app that reads biometric data from WHOOP devices via BLE and persists it to a self-hosted FastAPI+TimescaleDB server.

versions.localizedDescription:
- fix(tests): update Swift tests for GooseBLEClient→CoreBluetoothBLETransport rename
- fix(rust): sort BRIDGE_METHODS — protocol.* before realtime.*
- fix(rust): cargo fmt --all

- feat(126-01): implement GooseWakeWindowManager — wake-window alarm via SET_ALARM_TIME wire format
- feat(125-01): add cap sense on-wrist detection from EVENTS_FROM_STRAP events 10/11
- plan(125): fix C-001/C-002 — mandate DispatchQueue.main.async + [weak self] in handleCapSenseEventValue

- feat(ci): rename APK to goose-{tag}-unsigned.apk on release upload
- feat(protocol): add V26PpgWaveform variant and parse_v26_ppg_body (OPT-02, Task 1)
- fix(rust): wrap unsafe FFI calls in explicit unsafe{} blocks in android_jni.rs

- style: cargo fmt bridge and openwhoop_reference files
- fix: add packet_type_debug_name for unknown packet type visibility
- seeds: v13.0 hardware bands (Puffin/Monument/Symphony) and Rust arch refactor

- Resting HR floor: 30 bpm minimum (closes #130)
- Battery fix: R22 battery level for Gen5; Gen4 0xFF guard (closes #149)
- HealthKit import persistence to SQLite (closes #150)
- Debug 3-tab split, Logs & Export rename, Breathe haptics, live strain
- Schema v21 indexes, lazy init, BLE auth retry
- Fork + upstream PR integration (units, localisation, BLE recovery, sync donut)

- WHOOP 5.0 R22 realtime + v18 historical protocol
- BLE manager refactor + data validator
- Haptic buzz primitive + BreatheView
- Coach VOW nudges, Interval Timer, Metric Explorer, notifications
- Stress/ANS, Trends, Manual Workout screens
- Smart alarm UI + wake-window RE-gated stub
- Schema v20 (4 new SQLite tables)

- chore: archive v9.0 milestone — BLE Reliability & Protocol Parity (5/6 phases shipped)
- feat(about): add License section with GPL v3, copyright, source link; rename Model → Device
- docs(v9.0): milestone audit — passed (5/6 phases, Phase 66 hardware-gated)

- chore: remove REQUIREMENTS.md for v8.0 milestone
- chore: archive v8.0 milestone files
- docs(61): add pattern map

- chore: remove REQUIREMENTS.md for v7.0 milestone (archived to milestones/v7.0-REQUIREMENTS.md)
- chore: archive v7.0 milestone — Sync Correctness, Async & Sleep Sync
- docs: remove stale MVP-era recovery-todo.md — items implemented or in backlog

- chore: archive v5.0 milestone — Metrics Accuracy, IMU & Upstream Fixes (128 Rust tests)
- fix(audit): INT-06/INT-07 — add synced column + STREAM_ALLOWLIST to exercise_sessions and gravity2_samples
- fix(35): MOTION_THRESHOLD 0.01→0.20 g (cross-project review); MIN_BEATS 2→20 for RMSSD reliability
